title: Function Signature Generator
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a C++ function signature for a function named 'calculateArea()' that takes two parameters: a float and an int. The function should return a float value and should be declared within a class named 'Geometry'.
constraints: Must be written in C++ syntax
Must be declared within a class named 'Geometry'

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should be syntactically valid
The generated code should adhere to the specified constraints (C++ syntax and declared within a class named 'Geometry')
The generated function signature should correctly declare the function 'calculateArea()' with the specified parameters and return type
